2026-04-23T08:01:05.9602575Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-23T08:01:05.9603080Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-23T08:01:05.9603482Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-23T08:01:05.9603830Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-23T08:01:05.9604115Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-23T08:01:05.9604354Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-23T08:01:05.9604725Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-23T08:01:05.9604991Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-23T08:01:05.9605203Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-23T08:01:05.9605422Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-23T08:01:05.9605626Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-23T08:01:05.9605898Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-23T08:01:05.9606149Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
